event: Secular urban landscape along a Parisian canal
description: A calm canal stretches through the center of the composition, flanked by rows of multi-story stone and plaster buildings on the left bank. Figures and laundry are faintly visible along the quay. A wooden footbridge or lock gate spans the canal at the right middle ground. The water mirrors the buildings and sky with shimmering reflections. The right bank features a darker, reddish-brown structure. A pale blue sky with scattered clouds occupies the upper register. The brushwork is loose and luminous, capturing dappled sunlight on stone and water.
